pages.title: Careers with Sarah Hall MP | Join My Team Today
pages.meta_description: Explore exciting career opportunities with Sarah Hall, your dedicated Labour MP. Join our team and make a difference in our community. Find out more and apply today!
headings: h2: Parliament Constituency Office Address: The Office of Sarah Hall MP, The Old Coroner's Court, Warrington Town Hall, Sankey Street, WA1 1UH Labour Party Political - Promoted by Martin McManus on behalf of Sarah Hall both at Labour North West at Rutherford House, Floor 2, Suite 6B Warrington Road, Birchwood, WA3 6ZH team@sarahhall.co.uk Privacy policy
pages.text_excerpt: Careers with Sarah Hall MP | Join My Team Today Skip to content Sarah Hall MP Warrington South Survey Careers Contact Survey Careers Contact Facebook X-twitter Join my team Join our team and help make a difference here in Warrington South. Even though we don’t have any open roles right now, I’m always keen to hear from young people who care about our community and want to learn more about how an MP’s office works. If you’re interested in future internships, placements or work-experience opportunities, you’re welcome to register your details. When a position becomes available, we’ll be in touch with those who’ve expressed interest. Every day in an MP’s office is different, you’ll learn on your feet, meet local residents, and play a part in work that genuinely matters to people in Warrington South. If you have any questions, you can get in touch with Rosie Leck from my team. rosie.leck@parliament.uk Please be prepared to complete the form in one sitting. There is no option to save and return later. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. - Step 1 of 7 Position * School Holiday Intern School Term Time Work Experience College/6th Form Intern College/6th Form Term Time Work pages.title: Contact Sarah Hall MP | Warrington South
pages.meta_description: Contact Sarah Hall MP for Warrington South
headings: h2: Parliament Constituency Office Address: The Office of Sarah Hall MP, The Old Coroner's Court, Warrington Town Hall, Sankey Street, WA1 1UH Labour Party Political - Promoted by Martin McManus on behalf of Sarah Hall both at Labour North West at Rutherford House, Floor 2, Suite 6B Warrington Road, Birchwood, WA3 6ZH team@sarahhall.co.uk Privacy policy
pages.text_excerpt: Contact Sarah Hall MP | Warrington South Skip to content Sarah Hall MP Warrington South Survey Careers Contact Survey Careers Contact Facebook X-twitter Get in touch I’m here to help anyone who lives in Warrington South who needs support, advice, or a clear route through a difficult situation. Every week I speak with residents about a wide range of issues, from housing and health appointments to school places, work, welfare, safety, and local services. If something isn’t working for you or your family, please get in touch. My team and I will always do what we can to move things forward. You can use the form below to contact me directly. It comes straight to my constituency office so we can pick things up quickly. Please include as much detail as you can (Including any reference numbers etc), it helps us understand what’s happening and respond as fast as possible. My team handle all casework in confidence, and we’ll let you know what support is available or how we can escalate your case. I hold regular advice surgeries across the constituency and at my constituency office if we need to speak face-to-face. If you’d like an appointment, just select the option below and a member of my team will be in touch with available times and locations. Whether you’re struggling to get answers from a public service, facing delays with benefits or housing, or simply want to raise a concern about life in your community, you’re always welcome to reach out. My job is to listen, act where I can, and make sure your voice is heard. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.
